category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Mozambique.

title.en: China-to-Mozambique EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入莫桑比克：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入莫三比克：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Mozambique INNOQ conformity requirements, ARENE energy-sector regulation, EDM utility grid-connection requirements, IEC 61851 safety standards, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, IEC 61000 EMC standards, OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines. Mozambique's EV market is nascent and grid electrification constraints are material; all facts are framed accordingly.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与莫桑比克INNOQ合格评定要求、ARENE能源监管、EDM电力公司并网要求、IEC 61851安全标准、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、IEC 61000 EMC标准、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。莫桑比克电动汽车市场尚处起步阶段，电网覆盖率制约明显，所有事实均如实呈现。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與莫三比克INNOQ合格評定要求、ARENE能源監管、EDM電力公司併網要求、IEC 61851安全標準、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、IEC 61000 EMC標準、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。莫三比克電動汽車市場尚處起步階段，電網覆蓋率制約明顯，所有事實均如實呈現。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Mozambique, the confirmed practical gaps are: (1) connector hardware redesign is required — GB/T 20234 connectors are physically incompatible with IEC 62196 Type 2 (AC) and CCS2 (DC) couplers that Mozambique's internationally-aligned charging infrastructure targets; (2) IEC 61851-1 and IEC 61851-23 safety evidence replaces GB/T 18487 as the applicable baseline, and INNOQ conformity assessment applies to electrical equipment imports; (3) Mozambique operates on 220/380 V 50 Hz, matching China's domestic baseline voltage but requiring grid-connection coordination with utility EDM, which has limited grid reach outside major cities; (4) ARENE is the energy sector regulator and any charging-infrastructure project must be coordinated with ARENE and EDM; (5) OCPP back-office interoperability applies for networked public chargers. Critically, Mozambique's EV market is very nascent — national EV charger deployment is early-stage, grid electrification rates outside Maputo and major cities are low, and import volumes are small. Exporters should verify the current INNOQ conformity route, applicable technical regulations, EDM project-acceptance requirements, and ARENE licensing scope with local agents before shipment, as official online documentation from these bodies is limited.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入莫桑比克时，已确认的实务差距包括：(1) 需要进行接口硬件改造——GB/T 20234接口与莫桑比克国际对标充电基础设施所采用的IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）和CCS2（直流）接口在物理上不兼容；(2) 安全证据基线应由GB/T 18487改为IEC 61851-1和IEC 61851-23，电气设备进口须通过INNOQ合格评定；(3) 莫桑比克采用220/380 V 50 Hz电网，与中国国内基线电压相同，但须与电力公司EDM协调并网，主要城市以外电网覆盖有限；(4) ARENE是能源行业监管机构，任何充电基础设施项目须与ARENE和EDM协调；(5) 联网公共充电桩须支持OCPP后台互操作。需特别指出的是，莫桑比克电动汽车市场尚处于非常早期阶段——全国电动汽车充电桩部署处于起步期，马普托及主要城市以外的电网覆盖率较低，进口量很小。出口商应在发货前通过当地代理核实现行INNOQ合格评定路径、适用技术法规、EDM项目验收要求和ARENE许可范围，因上述机构的官方在线文件十分有限。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入莫三比克時，已確認的實務差距包括：(1) 需要進行接口硬件改造——GB/T 20234接口與莫三比克國際對標充電基礎設施所採用的IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）和CCS2（直流）接口在物理上不兼容；(2) 安全證據基線應由GB/T 18487改為IEC 61851-1和IEC 61851-23，電氣設備進口須通過INNOQ合格評定；(3) 莫三比克採用220/380 V 50 Hz電網，與中國國內基線電壓相同，但須與電力公司EDM協調併網，主要城市以外電網覆蓋有限；(4) ARENE是能源行業監管機構，任何充電基礎設施項目須與ARENE和EDM協調；(5) 聯網公共充電樁須支持OCPP後台互操作。需特別指出的是，莫三比克電動汽車市場尚處於非常早期階段——全國電動汽車充電樁部署處於起步期，馬普托及主要城市以外的電網覆蓋率較低，進口量很小。出口商應在發貨前通過當地代理核實現行INNOQ合格評定路徑、適用技術法規、EDM項目驗收要求和ARENE許可範圍，因上述機構的官方在線文件十分有限。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, INNOQ scope determination, ARENE licensing approval, EDM grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Mozambique conformity assessment rules, ARENE and EDM project requirements, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals and local agents before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、INNOQ适用范围裁定、ARENE许可批准、EDM并网审批、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士及当地代理核验现行莫桑比克合格评定规则、ARENE和EDM项目要求、IEC标准版本及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、INNOQ適用範圍裁定、ARENE許可批准、EDM併網審批、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士及當地代理核驗現行莫三比克合格評定規則、ARENE和EDM項目要求、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
